title: He-Man and She-Ra: The Secret of the Sword
original_title: He-Man and She-Ra: The Secret of the Sword
overview: After experiencing traumatic nightmares of a time now past, the Sorceress summons Prince Adam and Cringer to Castle Grayskull to give Adam a precious, jeweled sword and send the pair to the planet Etheria to investigate its secrets.
